title: Luna's Stackable Flowers
body:
# 🌸 lunas-stackable-flowers
Bushier, stackable vanilla flowers.

# ✨ Features:

## 🌼 Stack Flowers in One Block

- Stack up to 6 flowers per block
- Inspired by wildflowers, but works with vanilla single flowers

## 🧭 Directional Placement

- Manual placement sets a facing direction (north, south, east, west) based on player orientation
- Models rotate correctly for each direction
- Flowers are stacked counter-clockwise from the right bottom corner

## 🪓 Tools Interaction (Re-shape Your Flowers)

Reimagine how you interact with flowers using tools:
- Shovel removes 1 flower from the stack
- Shears make your flower stack shorter
- Hoe sets a new direction for your flowers

## 🌿 Bonemeal Growth (with Control)

Using bonemeal grows the flower stack naturally

- Increases flower stack by 1, with no specific direction
- Makes your short flower stacks taller

## 🎮 Vanilla First Design

Designed to feel like it could have shipped with Minecraft:

- No new items
- No complicated GUIs
- Fully compatible with existing worlds
- No changes to your world generation

## 🧩 Compatibility

| Minecraft Version | Status         |
|-------------------|----------------|
| **26.2**       | ✅ Supported    |
| **26.1**       | ✅ Supported    |
| **1.21.11**       | ✅ Supported    |
| **1.20.10**       | ✅ Supported    |
| Older versions    | ❌ Not supported |

# 💚 Credits

Created with care using Fabric, Blockbench and a deep love for Minecraft.
